notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. doubles (12) on a fly ball to left fielder Drew Gilbert. James Wood scores. Curtis Mead to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Luis García Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis García Jr. strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Giants challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Daylen Lile steals (7) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Eldridge hits a grand slam (4) to right field. Matt Chapman scores. Rafael Devers scores. Jung Hoo Lee scores.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Orlando Ribalta. Daniel Susac scores.

notableEvents.label: Buddy Kennedy pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Buddy Kennedy challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Buddy Kennedy called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Bryce Eldridge grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Eldridge hits a grand slam (4) to right field. Matt Chapman scores. Rafael Devers scores. Jung Hoo Lee scores.
